name: Noob vs Obby Two Player
description: Are you ready for the eternal battle between Noob and Obby? Weapons are drawn, and the war has begun. Choose your side in this war and start fighting with your friend. Whether you choose to be an Obby or a Noob, aim to win the war. You must battle against your friend. Use bombs, guns, and stones to defeat and kill your enemy. To win, eliminate your opponent and emerge victorious.
instructions: Player 1 can move with the WASD keys You can shoot with the S key Player 2 can move with the Arrow Keys keys You can shoot with the Down Arrow key Mobile play is available
tags: 2 Player, 2 Player Games, 2D, Adventure, Arcade, Arena, Battle, Block, Minecraft, Pixel
